title: What is your Favorite AI Language model to tell you what trades to take.
author: Natronix126
selftext: Hello i have automated my transactions mostly futures and forex currently. I just automated entries using Claude Opus i would like to here about your favorite AI language models to hook your accounts up to. by no means does this mean you should trust claude opus with your money i have had seriouse issues with ai language models in the past that performed poorly. i am currently in the forward testing stage with my ai integration

replies.author: Natronix126
replies.body: Do you have a profit factor i am still figuring out claude opus fully automated. Can you tell me about your prompt

comments.author: thecaveslapaz
comments.body: https://marketontology.com - uses macro and geopolitical intel to predict the price direction of assets-way more reliable than generic AI models for trading decisions.
